checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.cartEmptyHint: Add items from your cart before checkout.
checkout.cancelledMessage: You cancelled the payment. Your cart is unchanged.
checkout.successMessage: Thank you for your order. Your orders have been created.
checkout.cancelledHint: Payment was not completed. Your cart is unchanged. You can return to cart or continue shopping.
checkout.addressRequired: Please enter or select a delivery address before payment.
checkout.addressRequiredHint: Delivery address is required to complete your order.
checkout.mapHint: Search above or click on the map to set your delivery location. Address will be filled automatically.

orders.noOrdersSeller: Orders from buyers will appear here.
orders.noOrdersBuyer: Place an order from the cart to see it here.

profile.addressesHint: Saved addresses are used at checkout. Add at least one for faster checkout.

dashboard.subtitleBuyer: Browse and buy from the marketplace. Your orders and profile are a click away.
dashboard.subtitleSeller: Manage your store and listings from here. Your seller dashboard is ready.
dashboard.verifiedSellersDesc: Shop with confidence. Every seller on BazarCo is verified so you get a safe, trustworthy marketplace.
dashboard.catalogDescSeller: Organize products with categories and tags. Search, filter, and keep your catalog in shape.
dashboard.catalogDescBuyer: Browse by category and tags. Find what you need quickly with smart search and filters.
dashboard.noHotProducts: No hot products yet. Check back soon.
dashboard.noBestSellers: No best sellers yet. Check back soon.
dashboard.browseAndBuy: Browse and buy from the marketplace
dashboard.profileSettingsDesc: Update your name and view your account details
